summary: 5 film announcements, 9 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: FlySquad – First Strike!
film.talent: Cher, Bob Geldof (voice cast in talks)
film.announcement: Animated feature in development with Cher and Bob Geldof in talks to join the voice cast.

film.title: Austin Powers 4
film.announcement: Mike Myers confirms that a fourth installment in the Austin Powers franchise is in development and happening.

film.title: Phoebe Berman's Gonna Lose It
film.announcement: Movie in development at Netflix from the producer of 'The Nightingale' and screenwriter of 'Book Lovers'.

film.title: Steps
film.talent: Nikki Glaser, Ali Wong, Amanda Seyfried (voice cast)
film.announcement: Animated fairy tale in development at Netflix with Nikki Glaser, Ali Wong, and Amanda Seyfried as voice cast members.

film.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight 2
film.announcement: Geena Davis expresses interest in making a sequel to 'The Long Kiss Goodnight' with Samuel L. Jackson, describing it as her favorite project.

tv.title: Rock City
tv.announcement: Comedy series in development at Hulu from 'Abbott Elementary' star Janelle James and 'Happy Endings' creator David Caspe.

tv.title: Untitled Alex Cary Thriller
tv.announcement: Thriller series in development at Apple from creator Alex Cary with Dakota Fanning and Grace Gummer joining the cast.

tv.title: Exit Right
tv.talent: Susan Sarandon, Kim Coates, Roberta Colindrez, Amy Sedaris, Ethan Slater, Christopher Jackson
tv.announcement: Drama series wraps production with an ensemble cast including Susan Sarandon, Amy Sedaris, Ethan Slater, and Christopher Jackson.

tv.title: Survival of the Thickest
tv.announcement: Season 3 trailer unveiled for the third and final season of the comedy series.

tv.title: The Westies
tv.announcement: Crime drama series drops trailer with J.K. Simmons leading the cast; co-creator Chris Brancato teases Season 1 details.

tv.title: ComicView
tv.announcement: BET revives 'ComicView' with a new 'Rooftop Series' format hosted by Chris 'CP' Powell.

tv.title: One Night in Idaho: The College Murders
tv.announcement: Limited series renewed for Season 2 at Amazon with new testimony to be featured.

tv.title: Bridge & Tunnel
tv.announcement: Comedy special from comedian Des Bishop sets Hulu release date.

tv.title: Prison Break Reboot
tv.announcement: Lukas Gage teases a 'dark' and 'scary' reboot of 'Prison Break' in development at Hulu with plans for grittier content.
